# Dependencies for the LaBSE translation-QA triage (tools/labse_triage.py).
# Installed by tools/setup.sh into tools/.venv.
#
# These are intentionally range-pinned so setup works across platforms; the
# exact resolved versions are captured per machine in tools/requirements.lock.txt
# (generated by setup.sh) for a reproducible, auditable record.
sentence-transformers>=2.2,<4
numpy>=1.21,<3
